message:
Add active containers view with auto-refresh and run linking

Frontend: #/containers route with containers table, orchestrators
section, green running dots, run/task links, and 10s auto-refresh
that stops on navigation away. Dashboard nav link added.

CSS: .auto-refresh-label and .muted utility classes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
